notes: F001 P1 packet present and complete

focus: D3 Traceability - cited key_files & graph-metadata parity

findingDetails.title: Cited key_file goal-prompt.md missing from packet root
findingDetails.evidence: spec.md continuity key_files lists goal-prompt.md (line 20); prose line 66 directs readers to it; phase 007 research cites ../goal-prompt.md as symptom-report source; find returns nothing; graph-metadata derived.key_files correctly omits it
findingDetails.recommendation: Either restore goal-prompt.md or update spec.md continuity key_files + prose to remove the citation and note its disposition
findingDetails.scopeProof: find . -name goal-prompt.md -> none; ls root -> only before-vs-after.md, spec.md, timeline.md; 007 research/research.md:104 references ../goal-prompt.md

findingDetails.title: graph-metadata last_active_child_id stale (007 not 017)
findingDetails.evidence: last_active_child_id=007, last_active_at=05:45; timeline epoch five shows 017 at 19:43-19:55
findingDetails.recommendation: Re-run generate-context.js or update last_active_child_id to 017

findingDetails.title: spec.md prose calls phase 007 '(pending)' after Complete
findingDetails.evidence: line 66 'phase 007 (pending)' vs phase map line 84 Complete

findingDetails.title: spec.md continuity key_files diverge from graph-metadata derived.key_files
findingDetails.evidence: spec continuity has goal-prompt.md(missing), omits plugin files+spec.md; graph-metadata omits goal-prompt.md, has plugin files+spec.md
findingDetails.recommendation: Reconcile the two key_files lists via a single source of truth

results.summary: Most cited key_files resolve; goal-prompt.md does not

focus: D1 Correctness - decision-record rationale & completion-metadata consistency

findingDetails.title: Phase 006 decision-record cites broken relative research path
findingDetails.evidence: line 11 ../../research/research.md resolves to packet root which has no research/ dir; sibling spec.md:11,111 cites correct ../001-.../research/research.md

findingDetails.title: Phase 006 fails validate.sh --strict (3 errors) in a complete packet
findingDetails.evidence: validate.sh --strict RESULT FAILED: missing impl-summary.md + 17 header + 15 anchor issues; 013/impl-summary.md:99 documents as accepted pre-existing
findingDetails.recommendation: Add a closing implementation-summary.md to 006 or formally exempt never-implemented decision-only phases

focus: D2 Security - mk-deep-loop-guard plugin trust boundaries

findingDetails.title: Loop-guard state files accumulate unbounded, no expiry
findingDetails.evidence: writeLoopStateAtomic writes per-session file, never deleted; no TTL/sweep
findingDetails.recommendation: Add a max-file or session-end cleanup for .loop-guard-state/
findingDetails.scopeProof: mk-deep-loop-guard.js:117-146 no unlink on session end; grep unlinkSync only in temp cleanup

findingDetails.title: Guard blocking is opt-in via env vars; default only warns
findingDetails.evidence: throw only when MK_DEEP_LOOP_GUARD_REJECT(_LOOP)==1; else console.error
findingDetails.recommendation: Document the default-warn/opt-in-block distinction prominently for operators

results.summary: Two-check design matches catalog; registry coupling verified

focus: D4 Maintainability - mirror parity, checklist evidence, cross-doc consistency

findingDetails.recommendation: Correct the Verification Summary table to 12/10/1

results.summary: All 23 [x] items have evidence; summary counts inaccurate
Mirror divergence is intentional runtime-specific frontmatter
